overview: A premium Agency CRM app for digital agencies to manage clients, projects, tasks, and payments — all in one clean, fast, and intuitive interface.
features: Client management with analytics (total revenue, active projects, last activity)
Task management with progress bars and completion tracking
Smart deadline alerts (Overdue in red, Upcoming in yellow)
Advanced project filters by status, payment, and deadline
Quick actions: mark complete, add payment, add task in one click
Upgraded dashboard with overdue count, pending payments, and task stats
Premium UI with smooth animations, hover effects, and improved empty states
